headline: A Look At Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) Valuation After Strong Returns And Profitability Concerns
summary: Interactive Brokers Group (IBKR) has drawn investor attention after recent share price moves, including a 3.6% decline over the past day and a 7.9% drop over the past month, prompting a closer look at fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Interactive Brokers Group. Set against a 1-year total shareholder return of 57.49% and a 3-year total shareholder return above 200%, the recent 1-month share price decline of 7.95% suggests momentum has cooled in the short term while the broader story...
